interaction_logic.vs_evocation: Directly absorbs or negates elemental energy (Shield, Absorb Elements).
interaction_logic.vs_conjuration: Banishes summoned entities and closes planar rifts (Banishment, Dispel Magic).
interaction_logic.engine_hook: INTERRUPT_ON_CAST: If target is Abjurer, trigger 'Counterspell' check on incoming spells.

weakness_logic: Abjuration creates visible or tangible barriers; Divination bypasses them by finding weaknesses or 'True Seeing' through magical wards.

interaction_logic.vs_enchantment: Summoned creatures are often immune to 'Charm' if they lack a biological soul or follow distinct planar logic.
interaction_logic.vs_transmutation: Teleportation negates 'Restrained' or 'Slowed' status effects caused by physical alteration.
interaction_logic.engine_hook: ENTITY_SPAWN: Track summoned unit count; check for 'Concentration' break to de-spawn.

weakness_logic: Highly vulnerable to 'Dispel Magic' and 'Antimagic Field', which instantly unbinds the summoned matter.

interaction_logic.vs_illusion: Automatically pierces falsehoods (True Seeing, See Invisibility).
interaction_logic.vs_abjuration: Finds gaps in magical shielding; reduces target AC by predicting movements.
interaction_logic.engine_hook: ROLL_REPLACEMENT: Use 'Portent' logic to replace d20 rolls in the combat queue.

weakness_logic: The Diviner's mind is 'open' to information, making it more susceptible to psychic intrusion or memory modification.

interaction_logic.vs_divination: Overwhelms the info-gathering mind with false emotions or 'Feeblemind'.
interaction_logic.vs_evocation: The most effective counter to high damage is 'Charming' the damage dealer to attack their own allies.
interaction_logic.engine_hook: AFFILIATION_SWAP: Temporarily change 'Unit_Faction' tag of the target.

weakness_logic: Summoned swarms and extraplanar entities often have high mental saves or 'Mindless' traits (Constructs/Undead).

interaction_logic.vs_necromancy: Radiant Evocation (Holy Fire) stops undead regeneration and destroys hordes instantly.
interaction_logic.vs_illusion: AoE (Area of Effect) damage clears illusions by hitting the entire area, forcing 'Displacement' to fail.
interaction_logic.engine_hook: AOE_RESOLUTION: Calculate damage for all units within 'Radius_Value' geometry.

weakness_logic: Abjuration was specifically evolved to withstand Evocation; 'Evasion' and 'Magic Resistance' are Evocation's hardest walls.

interaction_logic.vs_evocation: Redirects attacks to 'Mirror Images' or decoy duplicates, wasting the attacker's resources.
interaction_logic.vs_enchantment: If the Enchanter cannot see the real target, they cannot cast 'Targeted' mind spells.
interaction_logic.engine_hook: MISS_CHANCE_REPLACEMENT: If Illusion active, check 'Target_Identity' vs 'Image_Count' before roll.

weakness_logic: A Diviner makes Illusion irrelevant. One 'See Invisibility' spell renders the entire school moot.

interaction_logic.vs_transmutation: Necrotic rot and decay target the life force directly, often bypassing 'Hardened Skin' or 'Armor' buffs.
interaction_logic.vs_divination: Darkness and Necrotic mists often blind Diviners or cause 'Psychic Backlash' when scried upon.
interaction_logic.engine_hook: HP_CAP_MODIFIER: Implement 'Maximum_HP_Reduction' that persists past healing.

weakness_logic: Necromancy is slow and requires 'Build-up' (corpses/rituals); Evocation’s instant, high-burst Fire/Radiant damage destroys it before it scales.

interaction_logic.vs_necromancy: Can 'Purify' blood or transmute necrotic flesh back to healthy tissue; 'Polymorph' gives a fresh HP pool.
interaction_logic.vs_abjuration: Alters the physical properties of weapons (Magic Weapon/Elemental Weapon) to bypass Abjuration wards.
interaction_logic.engine_hook: STAT_OVERRIDE: Replace 'Base_Stat_Block' with 'New_Form_Block' (e.g., Polymorph to T-Rex).

weakness_logic: A Transmuter can only be in one place; a Conjurer controls the battlefield map and can surround the Transmuter with summons.
